title: AI Toolbox Central Config
description: Schema for .ai-toolbox/config.json — the canonical client registry and toolbox configuration.

$schema.description: Schema reference for IDE autocomplete. Should point to ../.agent/schema/config.schema.json.

toolbox_version.description: AI Toolbox version this config was last migrated to. Required as of v1.5. Drives ai-toolbox migrate.

_meta.description: Documentation block — describes config purpose, source-of-truth rules, and detection priority. Not consumed by runtime logic.

primary_client.description: Client to use without autodetection. null = autodetect via setup.sh/ps1. Must reference a key in clients.

multi_client.description: Bootstrap behavior: true (default) generates router files for ALL supported clients so any agent can self-onboard. false generates only the file(s) for primary_client, keeping the project root clean.

tiers.description: Tier capability definitions. The three keys (basic/standard/full) are required.

clients.description: Client registry. Keys are short identifiers (claude-code, qwen-code, codex, ...). Values follow client.schema.json.

context.description: Hard budgets for ai-toolbox context build (added in v1.5). Enforced by context-build.sh.

max_files.description: Maximum number of files included in a context bundle.

max_lines_per_file.description: Maximum lines read from any single file. Files exceeding this are truncated with a marker.

max_total_lines.description: Hard ceiling on total lines across all included files.

priorities.description: Ordered list controlling which file categories are dropped first when budget is exceeded. Categories: changed, test, imports, same-dir, memory, plugin-hints, recently-modified.
